survived_details.original: state <= ACTIVE;    // any non-boost request drops to active
survived_details.mutated: state <= ACTIVE;    // any non+boost request drops to active

survived_details.original: current_level <= current_level - 1;  // ramp down one step per cycle
survived_details.mutated: current_level <= current_level + 1;  // ramp down one step per cycle

survived_details.original: current_level <= current_level - 1;  // ramp down one step per cycle
done <= 1'b0;  // default: done is a pulse
else if (req[3]) begin grant_next = 4'b1000; valid_next = 1'b1; end
survived_details.mutated: else if (req[3]) begin grant_next = 4'b1000; valid_next = 1'b0; end

survived_details.original: else if (req[3]) begin grant_next = 4'b1000; valid_next = 1'b1; end
survived_details.mutated: else if (req[3]) begin grant_next = 4'b1000; valid_next = 1'b0; end

survived_details.original: else if (req[0]) begin grant_next = 4'b0001; valid_next = 1'b1; end
survived_details.mutated: else if (req[0]) begin grant_next = 4'b0001; valid_next = 1'b0; end

survived_details.original: else if (req[3]) begin grant_next = 4'b1000; valid_next = 1'b1; end
survived_details.mutated: else if (req[3]) begin grant_next = 4'b1000; valid_next = 1'b0; end

survived_details.original: else if (req[0]) begin grant_next = 4'b0001; valid_next = 1'b1; end
survived_details.mutated: else if (req[0]) begin grant_next = 4'b0001; valid_next = 1'b0; end

survived_details.original: else if (req[1]) begin grant_next = 4'b0010; valid_next = 1'b1; end
survived_details.mutated: else if (req[1]) begin grant_next = 4'b0010; valid_next = 1'b0; end

survived_details.mutated: else if (req[1]) begin grant_next = 4'b0010; valid_next = 1'b0; end

survived_details.mutated: else if (req[2]) begin grant_next = 4'b0100; valid_next = 1'b0; end
